channel.title: Listed Building CCTV on The Security Gazette
channel.description: Recent content in Listed Building CCTV on The Security Gazette

item.title: CCTV for Listed Buildings and Heritage Sites — Conservation-Compliant Security UK 2026
item.description: How to install CCTV in listed buildings and heritage sites without damaging historic fabric: conservation-compliant mounting, discreet camera options, and listed building consent procedures.
